purpose: Single source of truth for every job Jamie has applied to (auto-submit or manual). Use this for dedup checks BEFORE adding any new candidate.

lane_definitions.AUTO_SUBMITTED: Pipeline submitted via Patchright. Confirmation page captured.
lane_definitions.PACKAGE_READY: Resume + cover prepared but not yet submitted. Jamie review queue.
lane_definitions.ROLE_DELISTED: Posting taken down before we could apply.

applications.title: People PM
applications.notes: Thank you for applying confirmation received. Awaiting recruiter response.

applications.title: Training & Development Specialist - Distribution
applications.notes: Your application was received successfully. Local Portland metro.

applications.title: People Operations & Workplace Experience Specialist
applications.notes: Thank you for applying. 2-4 YOE bracket = great fit. Stated open to relocation. 5 essay questions tailored to Jamie's actual experiences.

applications.title: People Operations Associate
applications.notes: Thank you for applying. Biotech holding co; M&A integration angle from Vestas was the hook. 2+ YOE met. 3 days NYC office, relocation stated. Sponsorship disclosed honestly.

applications.title: HR Generalist
applications.notes: 5th tonight. Aurora's react-select cracked via click-option pattern (v5/v6). Greenhouse email-verification CAPTCHA (8-char code pHjRiIdE) auto-fetched from Gmail and entered. Cover acknowledges prior Aurora Program Manager application (5/25). 2nd Aurora role = different team, different scope (HR Generalist vs Program Mgr).

blocked_or_decision_needed.title: Program Operations Manager, Human Data
blocked_or_decision_needed.blocker: Hard YOE gate: form asks 'Do you have at least 4 years industry experience?' Jamie has 3.
blocked_or_decision_needed.recommendation: Skip cold apply; pursue via direct LinkedIn outreach to Anthropic talent team (confirmed H1B sponsor + great scope match).
